S

searchEntrants(String, CoOrganizerRepository.searchCallback) - 类中的方法 com.example.syntaxappproject.CoOrganizerRepository
Search the entrants contain the string in search bar in their name
searchEntrants(String, PrivateEventInvitationRepository.SearchCallback) - 类中的方法 com.example.syntaxappproject.PrivateEventInvitationRepository
Searches all entrant profiles in Firestore and returns profiles whose name, email, or phone number contains the given query text.
sendInvitation(String, String, String, Notification, CoOrganizerRepository.addCallback) - 类中的方法 com.example.syntaxappproject.CoOrganizerRepository
Send a invitation of co-organizer to database
sendInvitation(String, String, String, PrivateEventInvitationRepository.SimpleCallback) - 类中的方法 com.example.syntaxappproject.PrivateEventInvitationRepository
Sends a private waitlist invitation by creating a new invitation document in the Firestore invitations collection.
sendNotification(Notification, String, List<String>, NotificationRepository.NotificationCallback) - 类中的方法 com.example.syntaxappproject.NotificationRepository
Writes a Notification document to Firestore and stores its generated ID back onto the object.

signOut() - 类中的方法 com.example.syntaxappproject.AuthenticationService
Signs out the currently authenticated user.
storeCSV(Context, List<Pair<String, String>>) - 类中的静态方法 com.example.syntaxappproject.CSVService
Generates a CSV from the provided list and stores it in the device's Downloads folder using the MediaStore API.
